storyTitle: The Hidden Signal Beneath the Lantern Market
openingSignature: detectives chase a false signal from a glowing map before entering a troubled liver district
twistSignature: the suspicious marker turns out to be evidence of a hidden structural takeover rather than the culprit itself
endingSignature: the detectives return to the lantern market and reinterpret the false map as a lesson about clues
clueSignatures: chronically weathered tissue appears before the culprit
a hidden district of cells follows its own logic
a recurring marker signal points toward the real culprit
